steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 1
steps.content:
Substitute $$x = 1$$ into the given equation: $$y = 0.25(1)^{2} - 7.5(1) + 95.25 = 0.25 - 7.5 + 95.25 = 88.$$
Thus the point $$(1,88)$$ lies on the graph.

steps.title: Interpret the point in context
steps.content:
In the model, $$x$$ represents days after the IPO and $$y$$ is the estimated stock price in dollars. Therefore $$(x,y) = (1,88)$$ means that 1 day after going public, the estimated stock price is \$88.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
